agentRecommendation.reasoning: 5637x3855 — highest-resolution Sorrento candidate. Shows distinctive rock pools and ocean beach — unmistakably Sorrento. Distinct from place-sorrento-01 (CC0 morning coastal scene). SA override required.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy. Week 3 slot advanced.
